name: nc-ui
description: Build deterministic plain-English UI apps. NC UI v1 compiles human-readable markup into HTML/CSS/JS with a stable runtime.

scripts.test: node tests/test_compiler.js && node tests/test_security.js && node tests/test_runtime.js && node tests/test_cli.js && node tests/test_project.js && node tests/test_adapters.js
scripts.build:examples: node cli.js build examples/portfolio.ncui && node cli.js build examples/landing.ncui && node cli.js build examples/dashboard.ncui

author: DevHeal Labs AI <hello@devheallabs.in>
